TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Joe_Adler, title = Joe_Adler, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Adler} }

S.FORM: == Joe Adler == kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Joe Adler, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
== Joe Adler == kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Joe Adler, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *oe a*ler == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oe a*ler, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
